title: CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g
content_html:
CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream 48g is a fragrance-free, non-comedogenic moisturizer designed to support the skin’s natural overnight renewal process. Formulated with a patented delivery system, it releases key ingredients gradually to provide sustained hydration and barrier support throughout the night. In the context of Bangladesh, where high humidity, urban pollution, and temperature fluctuations can stress the skin, this cream offers a lightweight yet effective solution for maintaining skin health while you sleep. The Emart team has verified the authenticity of this product, ensuring you receive a genuine CeraVe formulation suited for local climate conditions.

Key Benefits

  • Sustained hydration: Contains hyaluronic acid to attract and retain moisture, countering the drying effects of air conditioning and pollution exposure common in Dhaka and other urban areas.
  • Barrier support: Three essential ceramides (1, 3, 6-II) help restore the skin’s natural protective barrier, which can be compromised by humidity, sweat, and environmental pollutants.
  • Skin renewal support: Peptides in the formula support the skin’s natural collagen production process, helping to improve skin texture and firmness over time.
  • Lightweight texture: Absorbs quickly without leaving a greasy residue, making it suitable for use in Bangladesh’s warm and humid climate, even on combination or oily skin types.

Key Ingredients

  • Peptides (Matrixyl 3000): These short-chain amino acids signal the skin to support collagen synthesis, which helps improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of fine lines. They work gradually over repeated use.
  • Hyaluronic Acid: A humectant that binds water to the skin’s surface, providing immediate and lasting hydration. It helps plump the skin and reduce the look of dehydration lines.
  • Ceramides (1, 3, 6-II): Lipid molecules that are naturally found in the skin’s outer layer. They fill gaps between skin cells to strengthen the barrier, preventing moisture loss and protecting against irritants like pollution and dust.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): Helps calm the skin and improve uneven tone by supporting the skin’s natural repair processes. It also helps regulate oil production, which is beneficial in humid conditions.

Best For

  • Normal, dry, combination, and sensitive skin types
  • Those experiencing dehydration or dullness due to urban pollution and air conditioning
  • Individuals looking for a non-greasy night cream that works in high humidity
  • Skin showing early signs of aging, such as fine lines or loss of firmness
  • People with compromised skin barriers from over-exfoliation or environmental stress

Not Recommended For

  • Those with known allergies to any of the listed ingredients (check full ingredient list before use)
  • Individuals with active, severe acne breakouts should patch-test first, as the rich texture may not suit all acne-prone skin
  • If you are using prescription retinoids or strong active treatments, consult a dermatologist before adding new products

How to Use

  1. Cleanse: Start with a gentle cleanser to remove makeup, sunscreen, and daily grime. Pat skin dry with a clean towel.
  2. Apply treatments (optional): If using serums or spot treatments, apply them before the night cream. Allow each layer to absorb for 1–2 minutes.
  3. Dispense: Squeeze a pea-sized amount (approximately 0.5–1 cm) of CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream onto your fingertip.
  4. Apply: Dot the cream on your forehead, cheeks, nose, and chin. Gently spread outward using upward, circular motions. Avoid the eye area.
  5. Wait: Allow the cream to absorb for 2–3 minutes before lying down. This prevents transfer to pillows and ensures full penetration.
  6. Frequency: Use every night as the final step of your PM routine. For first-time users, start with every other night to allow skin to adjust.

Routine Fit

This night cream is designed for use in your PM skincare routine, after cleansing and any serums or treatments. In Bangladesh’s humid climate, it works well as a standalone moisturizer for normal to combination skin. For those with very dry skin or who use air conditioning overnight, you can layer it over a lightweight hydrating serum (such as a hyaluronic acid serum) for extra moisture. Avoid applying it in the morning, as the rich texture may feel heavy under sunscreen and makeup in high humidity. Pair it with a gentle cleanser and a broad-spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30+) during the day for complete protection against UV damage and pollution. If you are introducing this product to your routine, consider using it for at least 4–6 weeks to see improvements in skin texture and hydration levels.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches while the product remains the same original item.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.
